title: poa nemoralis var. rhenana
intro: Poa nemoralis var. rhenana, also known as the mountain meadow-grass or Rhenish meadow-grass, is a subspecies of the common meadow-grass (Poa nemoralis) native to Europe. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its saponin and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Poa nemoralis var. rhenana include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
